meaning_english: Formed or done for a particular purpose only.
The school, college, or university that one once attended.
A sentence or statement that has a double meaning.
Partial or total loss of memory.
Something that is out of its proper time.
A short, interesting story about a real person or event.
A nation or person engaged in war or conflict.
A phrase used to express good wishes to someone about to go on a journey.
A harsh, discordant mixture of sounds.
A picture or imitation of a person in which certain characteristics are exaggerated to create a comic effect.

meaning_kannada: ಅಂಧಾಭಿಮಾನಿ (ತನ್ನ ದೇಶ ಅಥವಾ ಗುಂಪೇ ಶ್ರೇಷ್ಠ ಎನ್ನುವವನು)
meaning_english: A person displaying aggressive or exaggerated patriotism or group loyalty.
In fact, whether by right or not.
The skill of clear and expressive speech, especially of distinct pronunciation.
Words written on a tomb in memory of the person buried there.
To officially absolve someone from blame or a charge.
To hand over a person accused or convicted of a crime to the foreign state in which the crime was committed.
A person who enjoys eating and often eats too much.

meaning_kannada: ಸುಖಾಭಿಲಾಷಿ (ಜೀವನದ ಪರಮ ಗುರಿ ಸುಖ ಎಂದು ನಂಬುವವನು)
meaning_english: A person who believes that the pursuit of pleasure is the most important thing in life.
A person who is abnormally anxious about their health.
A person who attacks settled beliefs or institutions.
Having one's true identity concealed.

meaning_kannada: ರಾಜ್ಯಾಂತರ ಕಾಲ (ಇಬ್ಬರು ರಾಜರ ಆಳ್ವಿಕೆಯ ನಡುವಿನ ಬಿಡುವು)

A person who travels from place to place.
Carried out in bad faith.
No longer produced or used; out of date.
